demoLabel: Mercer Newport Demo — example private wealth advisory workflow (Demo only; not affiliated with Mercer Advisors)
freeText: Demo scenario: client wants to sell an Aspen property and buy waterfront property in Newport Beach. Privacy level is high with a 6–12 month timeline. Partial financing with possible trust ownership. Needs licensed agent referral, lender/private banker review, CPA and attorney review, and privacy-first execution. This is an example wealth advisory workflow for demonstration only.

privateClientContext.objective: Sell Aspen property and acquire waterfront property in Newport Beach
privateClientContext.freeText: Demo only — example private client property transition for wealth advisory firm pitch. Not affiliated with Mercer Advisors.
